data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: All data is transferred between end-users and the site using HTTPS, with TLS ensuring secure transactions.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.2/1.3 is used to encrypt data in transit, protecting user credentials and sensitive information.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Employs machine learning algorithms to detect and mitigate potential threats in real time.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes AWS GuardDuty to identify malicious activity and unauthorized behavior.

data.title: Secure Access Controls
data.description: Uses strict access protocols and IAM policies to limit and control access internally and externally.
data.technical_spec: Implement identity-based, fine-grained access permissions via AWS IAM.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Defenses in place to prevent Distributed Denial of Service attacks from impacting service availability.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield and Web Application Firewall (WAF) used to mitigate such attacks.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent security audits and penetration tests to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated scans combined with manual reviews by cybersecurity experts.
